title: mikania scandens var. subcymosa
intro: Mikania scandens var. subcymosa, also known as the 'Climbing Hemp Vine', is a type of perennial vine native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mikania scandens var. subcymosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb in traditional medicine.
